name: ForemApi

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment:
Shared config for all API calls

    Config
        "https://dev.to"
        [ Http.header "accept" "application/vnd.forem.api-v1+json" ]

name: ForemApi.Article

aliases.name: Article
aliases.comment: Representation of an Article record from Forem API. All functions in this module should return an Article record.
aliases.type: { typeOf : String.String, id : Basics.Int, title : String.String, slug : String.String, socialImage : String.String, description : String.String, readingTimeMinutes : Basics.Int, publishedAt : Time.Posix, user : ForemApi.User.User, bodyMarkdown : Maybe.Maybe String.String, bodyHtml : Maybe.Maybe String.String, tags : List.List String.String, url : String.String, canonicalUrl : String.String }

values.name: articleDecoder
values.comment: Decoder to decode article data from Forem Api into an Article record.

values.name: fetch
values.comment:
Fetch an article by article's ID.

    foremApiConfig : ForemApi.Config
    foremApiConfig =
        ForemApi.Config
            "https://dev.to"
            [ Http.header "accept" "application/vnd.forem.api-v1+json" ]

    cmd : Cmd msg
    cmd =
        ForemApi.Article.fetch foremApiConfig 1208487 msg
values.type: ForemApi.Config -> Basics.Int -> (Result.Result Http.Error ForemApi.Article.Article -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: fetchBySlug
values.comment:
Fetch an article using author's username and article's unique slug.

    foremApiConfig : ForemApi.Config
    foremApiConfig =
        ForemApi.Config
            "https://dev.to"
            [ Http.header "accept" "application/vnd.forem.api-v1+json" ]

    cmd : Cmd msg
    cmd =
        ForemApi.Article.fetchBySlug foremApiConfig "no_81" "1st-post-2a1" msg
values.type: ForemApi.Config -> String.String -> String.String -> (Result.Result Http.Error ForemApi.Article.Article -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

name: ForemApi.Articles

aliases.name: QueryParameters
aliases.comment: A set of predefined query parameters used to fetch a list of articles.
aliases.type: { username : Maybe.Maybe String.String, page : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int, perPage : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int, tag : Maybe.Maybe String.String, tags : Maybe.Maybe (List.List String.String), tagsExclude : Maybe.Maybe (List.List String.String) }

values.name: blankQueryParameters
values.comment: Helper method to generate a blank set of QueryParameters

values.name: fetch
values.comment:
Fetch a list of articles using a set of predefined filters represented by query parameters.

    foremApiConfig : ForemApi.Config
    foremApiConfig =
        ForemApi.Config
            "https://dev.to"
            [ Http.header "accept" "application/vnd.forem.api-v1+json" ]

    queryParameters : QueryParamters
    queryParameters =
        blankQueryParamters

    cmd : Cmd msg
    cmd =
        ForemApi.Articles.fetch
            foremApiConfig
            { queryParameters | tag = "elm" }
            msg
values.type: ForemApi.Config -> ForemApi.Articles.QueryParameters -> (Result.Result Http.Error (List.List ForemApi.Article.Article) -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

name: ForemApi.User

aliases.name: User
aliases.comment: Representation of an User record from Forem API.
aliases.type: { userId : Basics.Int, username : String.String, name : String.String, twitterUsername : Maybe.Maybe String.String, githubUsername : Maybe.Maybe String.String, websiteUrl : Maybe.Maybe String.String, profileImage : Maybe.Maybe String.String, profileImage90 : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

values.name: userDecoder
values.comment: Decoder to decode user data from Forem Api into a User record.
